Meaning.En: A barrier constructed across a river or stream to stop or control the flow of water, typically creating a reservoir.
Meaning.Example: The government built a large dam to prevent flooding during the rainy season.

Situation.Vi: Xây dựng đập để điều tiết nước và phát điện.
Situation.En: Constructing a dam to regulate water supply and generate hydroelectric power.

Situation.Vi: Hạn hán làm mực nước trong hồ đập giảm mạnh.
Situation.En: Drought caused the water level in the reservoir to drop significantly.

Meaning.Vi: Đắp đập; ngăn nước bằng đập
Meaning.En: To construct a dam across (a river or stream); to block or restrict the flow of water with a dam.
Meaning.Example: The engineers dammed the river to create a artificial lake for irrigation.

Situation.Vi: Người ta đã đắp đập tạm thời để sửa chữa cống xả.
Situation.En: They dammed the river temporarily to repair the outlet pipe.
